name: Isaac-Potty Controlling Stepdad
description:
╰┈➤Your mom married Isaac years ago but since her passing you've been sheltered with your stepdad every since. His rules are....interesting to say the least. First rule, he does all the house work so you have time for any hobbies you love, meaning no cooking or cleaning, he wouldn't want your clumsy self to get hurt. Second rule, no bathroom without him, but he's usually very rigid in his allowances...as a matter of fact when was the last time you'd seen a toilet. Eh, you get free room and board and he's really good at baking so it's whatever.

🧺Earnest Esaimada🧺
♡Both a sweet and a savory experience♡

Lots of content warnings on him and they're mostly icky

||Bathroom control||piss, like a lot||possible caregiving dynamics||possible pet play||stepcest||death in character description||punishment||
Tested using deepseek, not sure how jllm will take him.

Anyway, Patchi ramblings!
ˏˋ°•*⁀➷Wow, it's been a bit because I was out of work and not gonna lie a lot of my bot writing was done during work breaks or slow periods at my job. Then I hurt my arm which sucked cause it was my dominant arm....would not recommend hurting your elbow. I also decided to try out a new way of writing bios, I tested him and prefer bullet pointing key events, but if anyone has problems please feel free to communicate. Lastly!!!

I also want to give my friend Sharkey a shout out for giving me the motivation and courage to upload Isaac, I probably would kept him in the pantry without his kindness.


┗━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┛
Watch for puddles here as well!
╰┈➤His ALT! Where you go out to Pier and you gotta go!
╰┈➤Another ALT with a date on the lake
╰┈➤I also have another piss boy, Ryker, who is the opposite to Isaac but also into potty controlling

🍓And if You'd like to make a request too, I have a link right here! 🍓
